gpt_comment: ⚠️[DIVERGENT] While baseline data suggests average temperature of 17.7°C with 33% chance of rain, Meteoblue reports a cooler temperature average (17.2°C) and no rain. YR.no and Météo France data could not be extracted. Looks like you'll need your bumblebee sweater rather than a raincoat in Paris today!
